title: Senior Teacher - LinkedIn Learning India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - LinkedIn Learning India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
LinkedIn Learning India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LinkedIn Learning India:
LinkedIn Learning India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LinkedIn Learning India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
